# How to Stop Debt Collectors - FDCPA Guide [2026] - Howtostopdebtcollectors
> Stop debt collectors with these proven methods. FDCPA rights, cease letters, disputes, and when to consider bankruptcy. 2026 guide.

## About
howtostopdebtcollectors.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- When Bankruptcy Is the Best Way to Stop Collectors - Howtostopdebtcollectors: https://howtostopdebtcollectors.org/bankruptcy-option.html
- Debt Collector Harassment - What Crosses the Line - Howtostopdebtcollectors: https://howtostopdebtcollectors.org/harassment.html
- How to Stop Debt Collectors - FDCPA Guide [2026] - Howtostopdebtcollectors: https://howtostopdebtcollectors.org/
- How to Negotiate with Debt Collectors - Howtostopdebtcollectors: https://howtostopdebtcollectors.org/negotiating-with-collectors.html
- Fake Debt Collector Scams - How to Spot Them - Howtostopdebtcollectors: https://howtostopdebtcollectors.org/scams.html
- Debt Collection by Text and Email - New Rules - Howtostopdebtcollectors: https://howtostopdebtcollectors.org/text-and-email-rules.html
- What Debt Collectors Cannot Legally Do - Howtostopdebtcollectors: https://howtostopdebtcollectors.org/what-collectors-cannot-do.html
- Your Rights Under the FDCPA - Howtostopdebtcollectors: https://howtostopdebtcollectors.org/your-rights.html
- Privacy Policy: https://howtostopdebtcollectors.org/privacy.html

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
